name: roar_skill
description: Phase 3 4th-skill test: champion holds position, three raiders walk in spread across a wide arc. Single Roar (N) hits all three at 0.6× damage. Each raider has 14 hp; champion damage 24 → roar 14.4 vs 14 hp = 1-shot kill on every overlap. Pass = 3 raiders dead, champion alive.

inputs.note: raiders should be in front by now
